instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [

]

    DTDFVocab:producedData SoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

]

    base:desc "Barometric pressure sensor with 0.1hPa resolution for snow load calculations, transmitting hourly"

]

instance PermafrostTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

    base:desc "LoRaWAN-encrypted temperature telemetry from 12 sensor nodes in 10km² grid"
]

instance SoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SoilMoistureSensor

]

]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PermafrostThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

    base:desc "HYDRUS-1D model calibrated with field data for unsaturated flow in organic soils"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SoilDataProcessingEnabler, DecisionSupportEnabler
]

instance GroundStabilityModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

]

instance SoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [

instance GroundDisplacementData : DTDFVocab:Data [

instance PermafrostDataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

]

]
